milestones.title: Certification
milestones.description: (Optional) Complete an online certificate, bootcamp, or structured course in web developer to build a strong learning foundation

resources.title: Web Developer Professional Certificates on Coursera

milestones.title: Core Skill Learning
milestones.description: Learn the fundamentals: build a solid foundation in html, css, and javascript — these are the essential building blocks for a web developer

resources.title: freeCodeCamp Learning Paths (HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Responsive Design)
MDN Web Docs: Learn Web Development
Udemy: Web Development Course Category
W3Schools Online Web Tutorials (HTML, CSS, JavaScript)
YouTube Search: HTML CSS JavaScript Tutorial for Beginners

milestones.title: Intermediate / Advanced Skills
milestones.description: Deepen your expertise by developing intermediate-to-advanced skills in responsive web design, react or vue.js, and version control (git), applying them through exercises and case studies

resources.title: web developer Intermediate / Advanced Skills on Coursera
web developer Intermediate / Advanced Skills on Udemy
web developer Intermediate / Advanced Skills on YouTube

milestones.title: Hands-on Practice
milestones.description: Gain hands-on experience by completing software projects, open-source contributions, or technical prototypes — focus on applying html, and css in realistic scenarios

resources.title: web developer Hands-on Practice on Coursera
web developer Hands-on Practice on Udemy
web developer Hands-on Practice on YouTube

milestones.title: Portfolio Building
milestones.description: Build a professional portfolio: publish your best projects on GitHub, create a personal website showcasing your work, and document your process and results

resources.title: web developer Portfolio Building on Coursera
web developer Portfolio Building on Udemy
web developer Portfolio Building on YouTube

milestones.title: CV / Profile Building
milestones.description: Prepare your professional profile: craft a targeted CV/resume highlighting your web developer skills, optimize your LinkedIn profile, and gather references or endorsements from mentors, instructors, or past collaborators

resources.title: web developer CV / Profile Building on Coursera
web developer CV / Profile Building on Udemy
